Id1.text: Alaa Abdul Zahra plays for Al Shorta SC and for Al-Khor Sports Club located in Al-Khor.

Id2.text: Alaa Abdul-Zahra's club is Al Shorta SC, but he is in the Al-Khor Sports Club whose ground is in Al Khor.

Id3.text: Al-Khor Sports Club is located in Al-Khor, one of the members of it, is Alaa Abdul Zahra, who is also part of, Al Shorta SC.
